figures.caption: Fig. 8: Experimental results of the method in this paper

Fig. 2: Proposed unsupervised LDCT denoising framework and generator architecture. The generator combines a U-Net structure for multi-scale feature extraction, an attention mechanism for feature fusion, and residual blocks for feature transformation.
Fig. 3: The discriminator uses the 70×70 discriminator structure of PATCH-GAN for precise minutiae discrimination.
Fig. 6: Visual comparison chart of window width and window position with and without window width.
